name: STEF SA
summary: STEF SA provides temperature-controlled logistics and transport services for agrifood manufacturers and retailers, and out-of-home foodservices. It transports fresh, frozen, and thermosensitive products, and seafood products. The company also provides maritime passenger and freight transport services between the continent and Corsica, as well as offers co-packing services. It offers its services in France, Italy, Spain, Portugal, Belgium, the Netherlands, and Switzerland. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
